productDisplayName: Nike Men Aquahype Black Flip Flops
description: Let monsoons pave the way for your style with these fun-to-wear-in-the-rains Aquahype flip flops from nike.Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)  Upper Thong strap construction in rubber Rubber toe separator for comfort Appliqué d swoosh on the strap Textured foot-bed Outsole Grooved TPU outsole with waffle patterned nubs and grooves for grip Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Flip flop care Wipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
